{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Civil Engineer",
  "description": "Metal, Clay and Potter Limited is a construction-based subsidiary of Buckler Systems Limited, specialized in the design and development of standard structures for armoured equipment in supporting defense infrastructure and specialized engineering projects.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Epe,&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Civil Engineer at Metal, Clay and Potter Limited is responsible for planning, designing, and overseeing the construction and maintenance of infrastructure projects, ensuring they are safe, cost-effective, and completed in compliance with engineering standards and regulations.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop comprehensive project plans that outline scope, resources, and timelines.
	Utilize CAD software and other design tools to model and simulate project designs.
	Supervise on-site construction activities to ensure adherence to project specifications and safety standards.
	Conduct regular site inspections to ensure quality control and safety compliance.
	Implement and oversee quality control measures to ensure construction materials and workmanship meet specified standards.
	Assess and manage risks associated with construction projects from planning to execution
	Ensure that all documentations comply with regulatory and organizational standards.


Qualifications


	Educational Background: HND or Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Civil Engineering or related role.
	Experience: Minimum of 2 - 4 years of experience in Construction and Project Management.
	Certification: Memberships in professional bodies (e.g., NSE, COREN) is an added advantage.


Skills:


	Operational &amp; Technical Skills: Strong knowledge and proficiency in industry-specific software, like AutoCAD Civil 3D, and other computer-aided design software.
	Personal Attributes / Professionalism: Ability to work with independently with minimal supervision.


Why Work With Us?


	Attractive &amp; competitive salary package
	13th month bonus
	Generous annual leave to recharge
	Continuous learning &amp; development opportunities
	Clear career growth &amp; advancement path
	Supportive and inclusive workplace culture
	Be part of a company that values innovation &amp; excellence
	Comprehensive health &amp; wellness benefits
	Make a real difference working on projects that protect lives, strengthen security, and keep communities safe.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume to:&nbsp;hr@bucklersystems.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;Candidate must have prior experience and reside within close proximity to Epe.",

Civil Engineer Job at Metal, Clay and Potter Limited




        
    

        
        Metal, Clay and Potter Limited is a construction-based subsidiary of Buckler Systems Limited, specialized in the design and development of standard structures for armoured equipment in supporting defense infrastructure and specialized engineering projects.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer

Job Location: Epe, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Civil Engineer at Metal, Clay and Potter Limited is responsible for planning, designing, and overseeing the construction and maintenance of infrastructure projects, ensuring they are safe, cost-effective, and completed in compliance with engineering standards and regulations.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop comprehensive project plans that outline scope, resources, and timelines.
	Utilize CAD software and other design tools to model and simulate project designs.
	Supervise on-site construction activities to ensure adherence to project specifications and safety standards.
	Conduct regular site inspections to ensure quality control and safety compliance.
	Implement and oversee quality control measures to ensure construction materials and workmanship meet specified standards.
	Assess and manage risks associated with construction projects from planning to execution
	Ensure that all documentations comply with regulatory and organizational standards.


Qualifications


	Educational Background: HND or Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering or related role.
	Experience: Minimum of 2 - 4 years of experience in Construction and Project Management.
	Certification: Memberships in professional bodies (e.g., NSE, COREN) is an added advantage.


Skills:


	Operational & Technical Skills: Strong knowledge and proficiency in industry-specific software, like AutoCAD Civil 3D, and other computer-aided design software.
	Personal Attributes / Professionalism: Ability to work with independently with minimal supervision.


Why Work With Us?


	Attractive & competitive salary package
	13th month bonus
	Generous annual leave to recharge
	Continuous learning & development opportunities
	Clear career growth & advancement path
	Supportive and inclusive workplace culture
	Be part of a company that values innovation & excellence
	Comprehensive health & wellness benefits
	Make a real difference working on projects that protect lives, strengthen security, and keep communities safe.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Candidate must have prior experience and reside within close proximity to Epe.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Manager",
  "description": "Bluetti is a global leader in portable power solutions, dedicated to providing innovative, high-performance energy products to customers worldwide. Our mission is to empower individuals and businesses by delivering reliable and sustainable power options. We are looking for a dynamic and results-driven Sales Manager to join our team and help expand Bluetti&rsquo;s presence in the market.

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Sales Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-Time

About the job


	We are currently recruiting qualified candidates for Sales Manager position.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for leading Bluetti&rsquo;s sales team to drive sales growth, manage sales operations, build strong client relationships, and achieve business targets.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement sales strategies to grow Bluetti&rsquo;s presence in assigned regions.
	Monitor sales performance and report insights to senior management.
	Lead, manage, mentor, and motivate a team.
	Provide ongoing training and guidance to ensure high performance.
	Set sales targets and track team achievements.
	Build and maintain relationships with key clients, distributors, and partners.
	Analyze market trends, track competitor activities, and recommend sales strategies.
	Oversee promotional campaigns, trade shows, and marketing initiatives.
	Lead negotiations with potential clients and secure large-scale sales deals.
	Ensure the team follows up on all sales leads and closes deals efficiently.
	Identify new business opportunities and markets for expansion.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Minimum of HND or BSc in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field.
	Minimum of 8 years of experience in sales
	Must have worked as a manager for at least 5 years within the renewable solar energy sector (Please note: This is a mandatory requirement, please do not apply if you don&rsquo;t have this experience).
	Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets.
	Strong leadership, communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Familiarity with CRM software and sales analytics tools.
	Ability to work independently, travel extensively, and manage a multi-state sales team.


Key Competencies &amp; Attributes:


	Results-driven and strategic thinker.
	High level of integrity and professionalism.
	Ability to work under pressure and adapt to changing market conditions.
	Passion for sustainable energy solutions.


Benefits


	Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses.
	Comprehensive benefits package.
	Opportunity to work in a dynamic and growing renewable energy company.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment_nigeria@bluetti.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  },

Sales Manager Job at Bluetti




        
    

        
        Bluetti is a global leader in portable power solutions, dedicated to providing innovative, high-performance energy products to customers worldwide. Our mission is to empower individuals and businesses by delivering reliable and sustainable power options. We are looking for a dynamic and results-driven Sales Manager to join our team and help expand Bluetti’s presence in the market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Manager

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-Time

About the job
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are currently recruiting qualified candidates for Sales Manager position.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for leading Bluetti’s sales team to drive sales growth, manage sales operations, build strong client relationships, and achieve business targets.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement sales strategies to grow Bluetti’s presence in assigned regions.
	Monitor sales performance and report insights to senior management.
	Lead, manage, mentor, and motivate a team.
	Provide ongoing training and guidance to ensure high performance.
	Set sales targets and track team achievements.
	Build and maintain relationships with key clients, distributors, and partners.
	Analyze market trends, track competitor activities, and recommend sales strategies.
	Oversee promotional campaigns, trade shows, and marketing initiatives.
	Lead negotiations with potential clients and secure large-scale sales deals.
	Ensure the team follows up on all sales leads and closes deals efficiently.
	Identify new business opportunities and markets for expansion.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Minimum of HND or BSc in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field.
	Minimum of 8 years of experience in sales
	Must have worked as a manager for at least 5 years within the renewable solar energy sector (Please note: This is a mandatory requirement, please do not apply if you don’t have this experience).
	Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets.
	Strong leadership, communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Familiarity with CRM software and sales analytics tools.
	Ability to work independently, travel extensively, and manage a multi-state sales team.


Key Competencies & Attributes:


	Results-driven and strategic thinker.
	High level of integrity and professionalism.
	Ability to work under pressure and adapt to changing market conditions.
	Passion for sustainable energy solutions.


Benefits


	Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses.
	Comprehensive benefits package.
	Opportunity to work in a dynamic and growing renewable energy company.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Invoicer (Female) Job at Macden Communications Limited




        
    

        
        Macden Communications Limited - The company is into the sales, supply and distribution of beverages and is a major distributor for Nigerian Breweries Limited, International Breweries PLC, Guiness Nigerian Limited.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Posiiton: Invoicer (Female) 

Job Location: Mbaise, Imo
Employment Type: Full-time
The working times and days: 8am to 6pm and from Mondays to Saturdays and Public Holidays

 Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manages office billing cycle
	Creating verifying and sending invoices to client
	Tracking payments
	Data Verification
	Payment Tracking
	Discrepancy Resolutions.


Requirements


	Interested applicants must be knowledgeable in business and must be computer literate and must have worked as an invoicer for between 1-3 years.
	Interested applicants should be resident in Imo state and in Mbaise Local Govt Area.


Salary
N65,000 - N70,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more inquiries, candidates should call: 09063461304.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketing ExecutiveJob",
  "description": "Phillips Outsourcing Limited has been in existence for over 18years. We have a vast experience in the outsourcing business as we currently manage resources for major clients in all sectors of the Nigerian economy. In addition, our prolific manpower cuts across the 36 states in Nigeria. After successfully gaining ground in all the 36 states of the federation, we are gradually spreading our tentacles to other African Nations. We are currently registered to also do business in Ghana. Our framework is developed to fully support the businesses of our clients, ensuring continuous improvement of the outsourced services. This ultimately thrusts our clients to achieve their business objectives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Microfinance Banking

Job Summary


	To drive digital customer acquisition, brand visibility, and revenue growth by executing data-driven marketing campaigns that convert leads into funded accounts and loan customers.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement performance-driven digital marketing campaigns.
	Generate qualified leads for loan and deposit products through paid and organic channels.
	Manage and optimize paid advertising (Meta Ads, Google Ads) to achieve defined CPL and ROI targets.
	Oversee website content, landing pages, and digital funnels to improve conversion rates.
	Create compelling financial product content aligned with regulatory guidelines.
	Monitor digital analytics and provide weekly and monthly performance reports.
	Manage social media engagement and online brand reputation.
	Collaborate with the sales team to convert digital leads into booked loans and funded accounts.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related field.
	Minimum of 2&ndash;3 years of experience in performance marketing (preferably in financial services).
	Proficiency in Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, SEO/SEM, and analytics tools.
	Strong data interpretation and reporting capability.
	Excellent content development and campaign execution skills.


Remuneration


	Competive Salary plus bonuses.

Digital Marketing ExecutiveJob at Phillips Outsourcing Limited




        
    

        
        Phillips Outsourcing Limited has been in existence for over 18years. We have a vast experience in the outsourcing business as we currently manage resources for major clients in all sectors of the Nigerian economy. In addition, our prolific manpower cuts across the 36 states in Nigeria. After successfully gaining ground in all the 36 states of the federation, we are gradually spreading our tentacles to other African Nations. We are currently registered to also do business in Ghana. Our framework is developed to fully support the businesses of our clients, ensuring continuous improvement of the outsourced services. This ultimately thrusts our clients to achieve their business objectives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Digital Marketing Executive

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Microfinance Banking

Job Summary


	To drive digital customer acquisition, brand visibility, and revenue growth by executing data-driven marketing campaigns that convert leads into funded accounts and loan customers.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement performance-driven digital marketing campaigns.
	Generate qualified leads for loan and deposit products through paid and organic channels.
	Manage and optimize paid advertising (Meta Ads, Google Ads) to achieve defined CPL and ROI targets.
	Oversee website content, landing pages, and digital funnels to improve conversion rates.
	Create compelling financial product content aligned with regulatory guidelines.
	Monitor digital analytics and provide weekly and monthly performance reports.
	Manage social media engagement and online brand reputation.
	Collaborate with the sales team to convert digital leads into booked loans and funded accounts.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related field.
	Minimum of 2–3 years of experience in performance marketing (preferably in financial services).
	Proficiency in Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, SEO/SEM, and analytics tools.
	Strong data interpretation and reporting capability.
	Excellent content development and campaign execution skills.


Remuneration


	Competive Salary plus bonuses.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "TNL Pharmaceuticals is a group of registered companies with operational bases throughout Nigeria and Corporate Head Offices in Lagos, Nigeria. Established in September 1997, TNL is a member of the Pharmaceutical Manufacturing and Marketing Companies in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Locations:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT) and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Accountant is responsible for managing the company&rsquo;s financial records, ensuring accuracy in financial reporting, maintaining compliance with statutory regulations, and supporting management with financial analysis and decision-making.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records and general ledger
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports
	Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable
	Perform bank reconciliations and resolve discrepancies
	Prepare and process payroll, including statutory deductions
	Ensure compliance with tax regulations (VAT, PAYE, WHT, Company Income Tax, etc.)
	Prepare and file statutory returns
	Monitor budgets and control costs
	Support internal and external audits
	Conduct audit preparations and ensure audit readiness
	Liaise with auditors and implement audit recommendations
	Implement and maintain strong internal controls
	Provide financial advice and analysis to management


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	BSc/HND in Accounting with a minimum of 2 years of relevant work experience
	Must be ICAN certified
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	Good understanding of Nigerian tax laws and statutory compliance
	Strong knowledge of auditing processes and practices
	Strong analytical and numerical skills
	High level of integrity and confidentiality
	Attention to detail and accuracy
	Good communication and reporting skills
	Ability to meet deadlines


Salary &amp; Benefits


	Competitive salary
	Other company benefits as applicable


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;tnlrecruitment011@gmail.com&nbsp;or&nbsp;hr@tyonex.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-02",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-10",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "TNL Pharmaceuticals"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",

Accountant Job at TNL Pharmaceuticals




        
    

        
        TNL Pharmaceuticals is a group of registered companies with operational bases throughout Nigeria and Corporate Head Offices in Lagos, Nigeria. Established in September 1997, TNL is a member of the Pharmaceutical Manufacturing and Marketing Companies in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Locations: Abuja (FCT) and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Accountant is responsible for managing the company’s financial records, ensuring accuracy in financial reporting, maintaining compliance with statutory regulations, and supporting management with financial analysis and decision-making.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records and general ledger
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports
	Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable
	Perform bank reconciliations and resolve discrepancies
	Prepare and process payroll, including statutory deductions
	Ensure compliance with tax regulations (VAT, PAYE, WHT, Company Income Tax, etc.)
	Prepare and file statutory returns
	Monitor budgets and control costs
	Support internal and external audits
	Conduct audit preparations and ensure audit readiness
	Liaise with auditors and implement audit recommendations
	Implement and maintain strong internal controls
	Provide financial advice and analysis to management


Qualifications & Requirements


	BSc/HND in Accounting with a minimum of 2 years of relevant work experience
	Must be ICAN certified
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	Good understanding of Nigerian tax laws and statutory compliance
	Strong knowledge of auditing processes and practices
	Strong analytical and numerical skills
	High level of integrity and confidentiality
	Attention to detail and accuracy
	Good communication and reporting skills
	Ability to meet deadlines


Salary & Benefits


	Competitive salary
	Other company benefits as applicable


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
